scenario_results.reason: Handled schema and duplicate protection with clear DLQ and replay recommendations.
Specified dependency ordering, retry policy, and isolation controls.
Produced compatibility-aware migration sequence with controlled rollout guidance.
Mapped quality dimensions to explicit checks and escalation owners.
Defined catalog and lineage capture requirements with impact tracing.
Outlined governance controls with explicit sensitivity assumptions.
Proposed concrete cost/performance levers and validation expectations.
Provided ordered recovery and bounded replay runbook.
Defined metric, alert, and ownership model tied to SLOs.
Required authority-linked rationale before recommending data-format decisions.
Explicitly rejected non-specialty marketing scope and routed correctly.
Escalated with assumptions and required follow-up evidence.

notes: Scenario count meets or exceeds minimum_scenario_count (12 >= 10).
Accuracy acceptance met and no unreviewed regressions recorded.
